{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Prophecy
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|A prophecy states that [[Eliadel]] will confront the Evening [[Star]] and stem the tide of blood so the Gate of the Heavens may open again.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16">''House of Blades'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|"Confront the Evening Star, and stem the tide of blood so the Gate of the Heavens may open once again,"<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Literature]]
